narrative:
Avon Lake City has 19,935 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
